workContext.summary: User is engaged in a candidate comparison analysis task, specifically comparing two candidates (崔亚飞 and 杨佳文) for a Java backend developer position. The analysis included PDF document parsing and structured report generation with 13 chapters, 8 data evidences, and 6 analytical insights.

recentMonths.summary: The user has been working on a candidate comparison analysis task, processing two PDF resumes (崔亚飞.pdf and 杨佳文-java后端-v8.pdf) for a Java backend developer position. The task involved using a multi-layer analysis system with planning, data extraction, worker execution, evidence aggregation, and analytical insight generation across 13 report chapters.

facts.content: The agent encountered errors due to binary format incompatibility when attempting to process a PDF document with read_file tool.
The system forced a stop due to repeated tool calls exceeding the safety limit during report generation.
The user is analyzing two candidates: 崔亚飞 and 杨佳文, for a Java backend developer position.
The analysis report contains 13 chapters, 8 data evidences, and 6 analytical insights.

The report covers: overview, basic info comparison, education, work experience, technical skills, project experience, career trajectory, strengths/weaknesses, job matching assessment, comprehensive scoring, interview suggestions, hiring recommendation, and conclusion.
The user is tracking the rendering status of a DOCX report artifact (art_b25f6ce37785).
